contraindications: Seaweed-derived extracts can carry meaningful iodine content so people with hyperthyroidism or hypothyroidism or Hashimoto thyroiditis should consult a clinician before use
theoretical antiplatelet or blood-thinning activity means caution with anticoagulant or antiplatelet drugs and discontinuation roughly two weeks before surgery
insufficient safety data in pregnancy and breastfeeding so avoid unless advised otherwise
may interact with diabetes medication and potentiate hypoglycemia.
